questions.question: Describe the key differences between the Minimax algorithm and the Alpha-Beta pruning algorithm for game playing. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Both algorithms are used in game playing, but they differ in how they evaluate nodes and reduce the search space.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using a language model like the n-gram model in Natural Language Processing? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The main advantage of n-gram models is that they can be trained on large datasets and can generate coherent text.

questions.question: Explain the concept of backpropagation in the context of neural networks. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Backpropagation is a method used to train neural networks by minimizing the error between predicted and actual outputs.
